subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter which thou didst address to Jináb-i-Áqá Muhammad-Taqí hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بجناب آقا محمد تقی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گشت
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
